publishedAbstract: This knowledge base article details the strategic benefits and technical implementation of **Collocated Virtualized Control Planes**. This architecture leverages a dedicated **three-node physical OpenShift cluster**—acting as a robust Hypervisor layer—to host the virtualized control plane nodes of multiple target OpenShift clusters.
publishedTitle: Deploying Highly Available Virtualized Control Planes on OpenShift Virtualization Cluster
